caption: A close-up view focuses on the side of a brown cardboard shipping box, which displays a barcode and the text "1/20 Count". The box features a label stating, "certificate of conformity certificate for this product shipment please refer to www.topps.com/cc". The alphanumeric code "PKG009402" is printed vertically near the barcode. In the background, a person wearing a black baseball cap and a black t-shirt is partially visible, sitting behind a desk. The surface beneath the box features a logo that reads "CASEBREAKS.COM". A small picture-in-picture window in the corner of the screen shows the same person and setting from a wider angle. Across the sequence, the camera shifts slightly, moving from a tighter shot of the box's corner to a broader view of the side panel, while the person in the background remains stationary.
